rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 48]>Welcome to Hateno Village's premier
boutique, Ventest Clothing!

rows.CNzh:

就打扮得时尚漂亮呀～？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:264]>今天要不要也從早
就打扮得時尚滿點啊～？
rows.JPja:

オシャレにキメて いきませんか～？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:264]>Want to start your day off in style?
You've come to the right place!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:264]>想不想打扮得能在黑夜中闪闪发光，

<unk[3:0:264]>What better way to enjoy the nightlife
than with clothes that glitter in the dark?

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:264]>Looking for a way to shine in the rain?
We've got the outfit for you!

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 77 95 48 49]>おっとっと！<unk[5:0]> お<Ruby={2:4}にい>兄さん<Ruby={2:2}ぬ>濡れちゃいますよ！<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 77 95 48 49]>Whoa, hey! <unk[5:0]>We're going to get wet talking
in the rain! <unk[5:0]>Let's find some cover!

rows.CNzh:

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:18 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83]>小哥，你这副打扮……<unk[5:0]>

难道是不小心丢掉了
店里买不到的衣服，
而苦于无法再次购买……<unk[5:0]>所导致的吗？

<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>那么，要不要找<Color=red>萨格诺师父<Color=white>
问一下？
萨格诺师父那里不仅新款服饰很棒，
在服饰藏品方面也很厉害哦。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:18 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83]>這位大哥，你那副模樣……<unk[5:0]>

難道你不小心丟掉了商店沒賣的衣服，
之後沒卻沒錢買其他服裝，
所以才會落得這種下場……<unk[5:0]>？

<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>那你可以去和
<Color=red>薩格諾師父<Color=white>商量看看。
薩格諾師父不只會設計很棒的衣服，
他收藏的服裝也很多喔！

<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:18 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83]>お<Ruby={2:4}にい>兄さん その<Ruby={4:8}かっこう>恰好…<unk[5:0]>

もしかして お<Ruby={2:4}みせ>店で<Ruby={2:2}う>売ってない<Ruby={2:4}ふく>服を

<Ruby={2:2}か>買えなくて<Ruby={2:4}こま>困った<Ruby={4:6}あげく>挙句の<Ruby={2:6}すがた>姿…<unk[5:0]>とか？

<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>それなら<Color=red>サゴノ<Ruby={4:8}ししょう>師匠<Color=white>に

<Ruby={2:4}ふく>服のコレクションも すごいんだから！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:18 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83]>Um, the way you're dressed...<unk[5:0]><PageBreak>You sold some clothes you didn't mean
to, didn't you? And then couldn't find a
place to buy it again.
Now here you are, standing around in
your underwear, wishing you could get
them back. <unk[5:0]>Is that it?
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>Then you need to talk to <Color=red>Cece<Color=white>!<PageBreak>She's not just an innovative designer,
but a devoted collector too!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:264]>啊！<unk[5:0]>小哥你来找我了啊！
在卡卡利科村那时候真是太感谢你了！
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>我正在仰慕的
萨格诺师父手下学习呢！
一开始要先从协助店内工作做起，

<unk[3:0:260]>啊，<unk[5:0]>对了！

<unk[3:0:264]>啊！<unk[5:0]>大哥你真的來找我了啊！

<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>我目前正在憧憬的
薩格諾師父門下學習喔！
首先要先幫忙店裡的工作，

<unk[3:0:260]>啊，<unk[5:0]>對了！

カカリコ<Ruby={2:4}むら>村ではありがとうね！
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]><Ruby={6:14}わたし あこが>私 憧れのサゴノ<Ruby={4:8}ししょう>師匠の<Ruby={2:4}もと>下で
<Ruby={4:10}しゅぎょう>修行させてもらえる<Ruby={2:4}こと>事になったの！
まずは お<Ruby={2:4}みせ>店のお<Ruby={4:6}てつだ>手伝いからってことで

<unk[3:0:260]>あっ そうだ！<unk[5:0]>
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:264]>Ah! <unk[5:0]>You really came to visit! Thanks again
for helping my family back in
Kakariko Village.
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>You wouldn't BELIEVE who I've been
studying fashion under! <unk[5:0]>Cece herself!<unk[5:0]>
I'm so lucky to have her as my mentor.
She's asked me to help around the shop,
so I'm trying to bring in customers.

<unk[3:0:260]>Oh, <unk[5:0]>that's right!

It's the worst!
If you ever find yourself in that situation,

able to help you out!
